Hello, I'm Stevie.
A graphic designer working from Liverpool in the UK.
With experience in Front-end Development, Branding, Illustration, Publication and UX / UI Design. I help businesses to connect with their audience through design and creativity. I'm available for independent projects and collaborations.

Having gained considerable experience both in-house and as a freelancer, I have worked as a designer on a host of projects with clients using different skill sets over the years. I'm available for freelance projects and collaborations - email me for a chat.
